line: - Implemented F16 as a new low-collision core engine module instead of editing contested predictive trigger files.

items: Implemented F16 as a new low-collision core engine module instead of editing contested predictive trigger files.

line: - Kept predictive pre-recall as an accelerator layered on existing audit/prefetch infrastructure, not a correctness path.

items: Kept predictive pre-recall as an accelerator layered on existing audit/prefetch infrastructure, not a correctness path.

line: - Used bounded audit-derived transition learning plus bounded speculative prewarm into the existing prefetch queue.

items: Used bounded audit-derived transition learning plus bounded speculative prewarm into the existing prefetch queue.

line: - Avoided `brain_store.rs`, planner, health, CLI, MCP, and docs because active agents already held overlapping scope there.

items: Avoided `brain_store.rs`, planner, health, CLI, MCP, and docs because active agents already held overlapping scope there.

line: - The repo already had partial predictive scaffolding in `engine/recall.rs`; the missing piece was a reusable learned-sequence engine.

items: The repo already had partial predictive scaffolding in `engine/recall.rs`; the missing piece was a reusable learned-sequence engine.

line: - Existing `AppendOnlyAuditLog` + `CacheManager.prefetch` were enough to add F16 behavior without inventing a new cache family or transport surface.

items: Existing `AppendOnlyAuditLog` + `CacheManager.prefetch` were enough to add F16 behavior without inventing a new cache family or transport surface.

line: - `brain_store.rs` currently centralizes some trigger semantics, so cross-agent coordination mattered to avoid collisions.

items: `brain_store.rs` currently centralizes some trigger semantics, so cross-agent coordination mattered to avoid collisions.

line: - This lands the reusable predictive engine and tests, but not full wrapper/health/doc parity.

items: This lands the reusable predictive engine and tests, but not full wrapper/health/doc parity.

line: - Another agent (`TopazElk`) is actively handling the trigger-mapping layer in `brain_store.rs`; final end-to-end F16 behavior depends on that integration layer.

items: Another agent (`TopazElk`) is actively handling the trigger-mapping layer in `brain_store.rs`; final end-to-end F16 behavior depends on that integration layer.

line: - I intentionally did not touch contested files to avoid stomping concurrent work.

items: I intentionally did not touch contested files to avoid stomping concurrent work.

line: - `PredictiveRecallConfig` with hard bounds for support, confidence, queue fill ratio, branching, and prefetch count.
- `PredictiveRecallEngine::from_audit(...)` to learn recall-to-recall transitions from bounded audit history.
- `predict_next(...)` for session-local predictions with namespace fallback.
- `speculative_prewarm(...)` to queue bounded speculative prefetch only when:
- queue pressure is still below the configured cap.
